'''zhongabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrotropic|iatrotropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrotropic|iatrotropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhongabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongabithi|zhongabithi]] || [[word:zhongabiji|zhongabiji]] || [[word:zhongabishi|zhongabishi]] || [[word:zhongabiki|zhongabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongabuthuthu|zhongabuthuthu]] || [[word:zhongabujuju|zhongabujuju]] || [[word:zhongabushushu|zhongabushushu]] || [[word:zhongabukuku|zhongabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongabuthu|zhongabuthu]] || [[word:zhongabuju|zhongabuju]] || [[word:zhongabushu|zhongabushu]] || [[word:zhongabuku|zhongabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongabufthuf|zhongabufthuf]] || [[word:zhongabufjuf|zhongabufjuf]] || [[word:zhongabufshuf|zhongabufshuf]] || [[word:zhongabufkuf|zhongabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongabethe|zhongabethe]] || [[word:zhongabeje|zhongabeje]] || [[word:zhongabeshe|zhongabeshe]] || [[word:zhongabeke|zhongabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongabothotho|zhongabothotho]] || [[word:zhongabojojo|zhongabojojo]] || [[word:zhongaboshosho|zhongaboshosho]] || [[word:zhongabokoko|zhongabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongabotho|zhongabotho]] || [[word:zhongabojo|zhongabojo]] || [[word:zhongabosho|zhongabosho]] || [[word:zhongaboko|zhongaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongabofthof|zhongabofthof]] || [[word:zhongabofjof|zhongabofjof]] || [[word:zhongabofshof|zhongabofshof]] || [[word:zhongabofkof|zhongabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongabĂŠthĂŠ|zhongabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongabĂŠjĂŠ|zhongabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongabĂŠshĂŠ|zhongabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongabĂŠkĂŠ|zhongabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongabathatha|zhongabathatha]] || [[word:zhongabajaja|zhongabajaja]] || [[word:zhongabashasha|zhongabashasha]] || [[word:zhongabakaka|zhongabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongabatha|zhongabatha]] || [[word:zhongabaja|zhongabaja]] || [[word:zhongabasha|zhongabasha]] || [[word:zhongabaka|zhongabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongabafthaf|zhongabafthaf]] || [[word:zhongabafjaf|zhongabafjaf]] || [[word:zhongabafshaf|zhongabafshaf]] || [[word:zhongabafkaf|zhongabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhongabasha|zhongabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongabshĂ«sha|zhongabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongabrosha|zhongabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongabmusha|zhongabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongabyasha|zhongabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongabnkshĂ«sha|gozhongabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongabnkrosha|gozhongabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongabnkmusha|gozhongabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongabnkyasha|gozhongabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhongangabasha|zhongangabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongangabshĂ«sha|zhongangabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongangabrosha|zhongangabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongangabmusha|zhongangabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongangabyasha|zhongangabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongangabnkshĂ«sha|gozhongangabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongangabnkrosha|gozhongangabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongangabnkmusha|gozhongangabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongangabnkyasha|gozhongangabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhengĂŠbasha|zhengĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhengĂŠbshĂ«sha|zhengĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhengĂŠbrosha|zhengĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhengĂŠbmusha|zhengĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhengĂŠbyasha|zhengĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|gozhengĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠbnkrosha|gozhengĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠbnkmusha|gozhengĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠbnkyasha|gozhengĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhongfabasha|zhongfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongfabshĂ«sha|zhongfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongfabrosha|zhongfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongfabmusha|zhongfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongfabyasha|zhongfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongfabnkshĂ«sha|gozhongfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongfabnkrosha|gozhongfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongfabnkmusha|gozhongfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongfabnkyasha|gozhongfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
